roo.description: The best free models to get started

landing.introduction: With a range of built-in and extensible Modes, Lite-Agent lets you plan, architect, code, debug and boost your productivity like never before.

providerSignup.heading: Choose your provider
providerSignup.chooseProvider: Roo needs an LLM provider to work. Choose one to get started, you can add more later.
providerSignup.useAnotherProviderDescription: Enter an API key and get going.

startRouter: We recommend using an LLM Router:
startCustom: Or you can bring your provider API key:

telemetry.helpImproveMessage: Lite-Agent collects error and usage data to help us fix bugs and improve the extension. This telemetry does not collect code, prompts or personal information. You can turn this off in <settingsLink>settings</settingsLink>.
